zh.lifeSummary: 當William Murray - III Laird of Tullibardine於大約1290年出生在蘇格蘭培爾圖利巴迪時，他的父親Sir Andrew Murray 2nd Laird of Tullibardine7歲，母親Lady Christian Bruce aka "de Bruce, de Seton, de Moray"18歲。他和Mabel Isabella Randolf至少有3個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1352年5月31日之前在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Murray - III Laird of Tullibardine于大约1290年出生在苏格兰培爾圖利巴迪时，他的父亲Sir Andrew Murray 2nd Laird of Tullibardine7岁，母亲Lady Christian Bruce aka "de Bruce, de Seton, de Moray"18岁。他和Mabel Isabella Randolf至少有3个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1352年5月31日之前在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Murray
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Moray in northeastern Scotland, which derives from Celtic mori- ‘sea’ + treb- ‘settlement’. The founder of the Scottish house of Murray was a Fleming named Freskin who was granted Strathbrock in West Lothian and Duffus in Moray by David I. The family took its name from the region in the late 12th century.
Irish and Scottish: shortened form of   McMurray  .
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Muireadhaigh ‘descendant of Muireadhach’ a personal name meaning ‘mariner’. Occasionally it may be a shortened form of McMurray .

variants.name: Murry
meanings: Scottish and Irish: variant of   Murray  .

variants.name: Murrah
meanings: Probably an altered form of Scottish   Murray  .

variants.name: Murie
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Murie in Errol (Perthshire).
Scottish and Irish: variant of   Murray  .

variants.name: Merhi
meanings: Arabic (mainly Lebanon and Syria): from a variant of the personal name Mirhi of unknown meaning. Bearers of this surname are both Muslims and Christians. Compare Murray 5.

variants.name: McMurray
meanings: Irish (northern) and Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Muireadhaigh or Mac Muireadhaich, a patronymic from the personal name Muireadhach ‘seafarer’ (see Murdoch ). Compare McCurry 1.

variants.name: Murra
meanings: Italian (Sicily): topographic name from Sicilian murra ‘large rock, mass of rocks’ or a habitational name from a place called with this word.
Albanian: nickname from murrë (definite form murra) ‘dark gray cow’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Murray - III Laird of Tullibardine was born about 1290, in Tullibardine, Perthshire, Scotland, his father, Sir Andrew Murray 2nd Laird of Tullibardine, was 7 and his mother, Lady Christian Bruce aka "de Bruce, de Seton, de Moray", was 18. He had at least 3 sons and 1 daughter with Mabel Isabella Randolf. He died before 31 May 1352, in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Murray - III Laird of Tullibardine est né environ 1290, à Tullibardine, Perthshire, Écosse, son père, Sir Andrew Murray 2nd Laird of Tullibardine, avait 7 ans et sa mère, Lady Christian Bruce aka "de Bruce, de Seton, de Moray", avait 18 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille avec Mabel Isabella Randolf. Il est décédé avant 31 mai 1352, dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Murray - III Laird of Tullibardine um 1290 in Tullibardine, Perthshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Andrew Murray 2nd Laird of Tullibardine 7 und seine Mutter Lady Christian Bruce aka "de Bruce, de Seton, de Moray" 18. Er hatte mit Mabel Isabella Randolf mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb vor 31. Mai 1352 in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Murray - III Laird of Tullibardine è nato il circa 1290 nel Tullibardine, Perthshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Sir Andrew Murray 2nd Laird of Tullibardine, aveva 7 anni e il suo madre, Lady Christian Bruce aka "de Bruce, de Seton, de Moray", aveva 18 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia con Mabel Isabella Randolf. Morì prima del 31 maggio 1352, nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: William Murray - III Laird of Tullibardineが約1290年にスコットランドペルスシュアイアトゥリバーディンで生まれた時，父Sir Andrew Murray 2nd Laird of Tullibardineは7歳，母Lady Christian Bruce aka "de Bruce, de Seton, de Moray"は18歳であった。彼はMabel Isabella Randolfとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1352年5月31日以前に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Murray - III Laird of Tullibardine(이)가 대략 1290년 스컷랜드 퍼스실르 툴리바딘에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Andrew Murray 2nd Laird of Tullibardine(은)는 7세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Christian Bruce aka "de Bruce, de Seton, de Moray"(은)는 18세였다. 그는 Mabel Isabella Randolf(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1352년 5월 31일 이전 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Murray - III Laird of Tullibardine nasceu aproximadamente 1290, em Tullibardine, Perthshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir Andrew Murray 2nd Laird of Tullibardine, tinha 7 anos e sua mãe, Lady Christian Bruce aka "de Bruce, de Seton, de Moray", tinha 18 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha com Mabel Isabella Randolf. Ele faleceu antes 31 de maio de 1352, em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Murray - III Laird of Tullibardine родился около 1290 г. в местности туллибардаин, пиртшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Sir Andrew Murray 2nd Laird of Tullibardine было 7 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Christian Bruce aka "de Bruce, de Seton, de Moray", 18. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь от Mabel Isabella Randolf. Он умер перед 31 май 1352 г. в его родном городе.
